body.body: Rewrite ~/TheIgors/superclaude to: 1) Source ~/.TheIgors/igor_wild_0001/.env to get all keys. 2) Read ~/.TheIgors/cc_channel/anthropic_balance.json if exists and < 24h old. 3) If Anthropic balance > $10 OR file missing: set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=REAL_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, unset ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL. 4) If Anthropic balance <= $10: set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=OPENROUTER_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=https://openrouter.ai/api. 5) Log decision + balance to ~/.TheIgors/logs/superclaude.log. 6) exec claude --dangerously-skip-permissions "$@". Default to Anthropic when file missing. Once failed over to OR, stays OR (file persists the low balance).
body.title: D088: superclaude Anthropic→OR failover
body.result: superclaude rewritten: sources .env, reads anthropic_balance.json (24h TTL), falls over to OR (ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=https://openrouter.ai/api) when balance<=$10, stays Anthropic direct otherwise; logs every decision+balance to ~/.TheIgors/logs/superclaude.log; exec claude --dangerously-skip-permissions "$@". Syntax OK.
